topStories.title: 'Definitely carried out by Zionists': Iran denies involvement in attack on US Embassy in Riyadh
topStories.description: Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps condemned the March attack on the US embassy in Riyadh, denying involvement and blaming Israel. Following drone strikes on Oman, Iran claimed these were ‘false flag’ operations. Tensions rise as Iran rejects a US ceasefire proposal amid escalating conflict.
